title: Route des Grandes Alpes
cinematic_pitch: The legendary Route des Grandes Alpes. From the shores of Lake Geneva to the Mediterranean coast at Nice. Crossing the highest passes in Europe including the Col de l'Iseran and Col de la Bonette.
highlights: Col de l'Iseran — the highest paved pass in the Alps
Col de la Bonette — the highest road in Europe
Lake Geneva to Nice — from the peaks to the palms
17 major mountain passes in one continuous line
